issues.description: GiveDon is incorrect. Effect text says 'Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck' — this is SearchDeck (fetch from deck), not GiveDon (create DON!! tokens). Should search deck for DON card.
Rest action targets Self, but the DON card being added from deck needs to be rested, not the character. Target should be the searched card.
Missing condition. DrawCard action should only occur 'if you have 6 or more DON!! cards on your field' — needs HasAttachedDon condition with count:6.
Extraneous second effect with Trigger and PlaySelf. No play-itself mechanic exists in card text. This should be removed entirely.
